faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Ardsley typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of colonies present. faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my Ardsley home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than typical household ants (usually ¼ to ½ inch long) and are black or dark brown. Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and winged ants emerging in spring. If you notice any of these signs in your Ardsley home, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.
